business_id:
Your Xendit Business ID.

Required when migrating for multiple subaccounts.
card_expiry_month:
Card expiry month in two-digit format, e.g. 09

Required
card_expiry_year:
Card expiry year in four-digit format, e.g. 2028

Required
reference_id:
A unique identifier for the card. Must not be duplicated.

Required
network_transaction_id:
Transaction identifier returned by the scheme.

Optional, but recommended to improve success rate of future charges.
card_holder_first_name: Card holder's first name shown in card
card_holder_last_name: Card holder's last name shown in card
card_holder_phone_number:
Card holder's phone number or mobile number.

Use +(country_code) as prefix, with no - and/or blank space
billing_details_first_name: First name of the billing details
billing_details_last_name: Last name of the billing details
billing_details_phone_number:
Phone number of the billing details.

Use +(country_code) as prefix, with no - and/or blank space
billing_details_address_line_1: Line 1 of street address e.g., building name and apartment number
billing_details_address_line_2: Line 2 of street address e.g., street number and name
billing_details_address_postal_code: Postal, zip or rural delivery code, if applicable
billing_details_address_city: City, village or town as appropriate
billing_details_address_state: Geographic area, province, state, or region, if applicable. If the user is USA citizen, make sure to use state code (e.g put CA instead of California)
billing_details_address_country: 2-letter ISO 3166-2 country code for the customer's country of residence
